info.title: Absa Account Information Services
info.description: The Absa AIS services provide account information services exposed via an ASP.NET Core Web API

get.summary: Retrieves the full list of accounts and account information that the PSU has authorised to access.

parameters.name: X-Absa-ClientInteractionId
parameters.description: An unique value used as a correlation id to enable a request to be traced.

parameters.name: X-Absa-Nonce
parameters.description: Every request will be processed only once per nonce. The nonce will be valid for 15 minutes.

parameters.name: X-Absa-Initiating-UserId
parameters.description: The id of the user in the source system that initiated the request.For requests issued by a system process this should be the name of the system.

parameters.name: X-Absa-Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: A unique reference id for end to end traceability.

parameters.name: X-Absa-Country-Code
parameters.description: The country code from where the AIS transaction originates.

parameters.name: X-Absa-Client-Auth
parameters.description: Authentication token obtained after the client logs in via the online banking channel to give consent to proceed with the AIS instruction.

Retry-After.description: Specifies the amount of time in seconds that a client must wait before retrying the request.

get.summary: Retrieves the account information for the specified account that the PSU has authorised to access.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: A unique identifier used to identify the account resource.

parameters.name: X-Absa-Initiating-UserId

parameters.name: X-Absa-Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: A unique reference id for end to end traceability.

parameters.name: X-Absa-Country-Code
parameters.description: The country code from where the AIS transaction originates.

parameters.name: X-Absa-Client-Auth
parameters.description: Authentication token obtained after the client logs in via the online banking channel to give consent to proceed with the AIS instruction.

Retry-After.description: Specifies the amount of time in seconds that a client must wait before retrying the request.

get.summary: Retrieves an application audit log with unprotected data.

parameters.description: The id of the user in the source system that initiated the request.For requests issued by a system process this should be the name of the system.

get.summary: Retrieves the full list of account transaction information that the PSU has authorised to access.

parameters.name: fromBookingDateTime
parameters.description: Include transactions from this date.

parameters.name: toBookingDateTime
parameters.description: Include transactions to this date.
